user.title: Connect to OpenChore
user.description: Enter the URL and API token for your OpenChore server.

data_description.url: The base URL of your OpenChore server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080)
data_description.token: An API token created in the OpenChore admin panel

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the OpenChore server

abort.already_configured: This OpenChore server is already configured

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the OpenChore server for updated chore data (30–3600 seconds).

trigger_chore.name: Trigger Chore
trigger_chore.description: Trigger a chore via its webhook, creating a one-off schedule for today.

trigger_uuid.name: Trigger UUID
trigger_uuid.description: The UUID of the chore trigger to fire.

assign_to.name: Assign To
assign_to.description: Username to assign the chore to. If omitted, uses the trigger's default.

due_by.name: Due By
due_by.description: Time by which the chore must be completed (e.g. 18:00). Overrides the trigger's default.

available_at.name: Available At
available_at.description: Time at which the chore becomes available (e.g. 08:00). Overrides the trigger's default.
